falsification_conditions.condition: The price increases by 15% or more over the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant upward move would contradict the blowoff pattern expectation, indicating a bullish continuation rather than a bearish collapse.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume remains below 50% of the 30-day average for the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volume would indicate lack of participation, invalidating the blowoff scenario which typically requires high volatility and volume.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above the 200-day moving average by 3% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would directly contradict the pattern's bearish implications, proving the current hold verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
